attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Pope Leo XIV's encyclical, Magnifica Humanitas, emphasizes the non-neutral nature of technology, urging technologists and policymakers to engage critically with artificial intelligence.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The AI Hype Index reveals a mixed reception for AI during graduation season, indicating skepticism among new graduates towards the promises of technological transformation.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: As organizations increasingly adopt AI agents, there is a notable disparity between their ambition to become agentic and their actual implementation efforts.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Contrary to fears of mass unemployment due to AI, recent data suggests stability in aggregate employment, highlighting the need to address current challenges in entry-level job markets.
